mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM rn, a.* FROM ( SELECT b.board_code, b.board_title, b.board_contents, b.board_read_count, b.board_ref, b.board_ref_lvl, b.board_ref_step, b.reg_emp_no, b.reg_date, e.emp_name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) AS answer_count FROM board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE b.board_ref_lvl = 0
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND (b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) > 0
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) = 0
ORDER BY b.board_ref DESC, b.board_ref_step ASC ) a ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end}

SELECT b.board_code, b.board_title, b.board_contents, b.board_read_count, b.board_ref, b.board_ref_lvl, b.board_ref_step, b.reg_emp_no, b.reg_date, e.emp_name, e.user_access FROM board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE b.board_ref = (SELECT board_ref FROM board WHERE board_code = #{boardCode}) ORDER BY b.board_ref_step ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board ( board_code, board_title, board_contents, board_read_count, board_ref, board_ref_lvl, board_ref_step, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_code), 0) + 1 FROM board), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, 0, (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_ref), 0) + 1 FROM board), 0, 0, #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO board ( board_code, board_title, board_contents, board_read_count, board_ref, board_ref_lvl, board_ref_step, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_code), 0) + 1 FROM board), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, 0, #{boardRef}, 1, (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_ref_step), 0) + 1 FROM board WHERE board_ref = #{boardRef}), #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO board ( board_code, board_title, board_contents, board_read_count, board_ref, board_ref_lvl, board_ref_step, reg_emp_no, reg_date ) VALUES ( (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_code), 0) + 1 FROM board), #{boardTitle}, #{boardContents}, 0, #{boardRef}, 2, (SELECT NVL(MAX(board_ref_step), 0) + 1 FROM board WHERE board_ref = #{boardRef}), #{regEmpNo}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT reg_emp_no FROM board WHERE board_code = #{boardCode} AND board_ref_lvl = 0

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.reg_emp_no = e.emp_no WHERE b.board_ref_lvl = 0
AND b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND (b.board_title LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%' OR e.emp_name LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%')
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) > 0
AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board WHERE board_ref = b.board_ref AND board_ref_lvl = 1) = 0
